revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Trinidad and Tobago/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Trinidad and Tobago/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Trinidad_and_Tobago%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Trinidad_and_Tobago%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
==Other flags==
{{mono|Country_data}} templates are also available for each of the 14 regions/municipalities of [[:en:Trinidad and Tobago|Trinidad and Tobago]]:
{| style="background-color:#ecfcf4"
| [[Template:Country data Couva-Tabaquite-Talparo]] || {{flag|Couva–Tabaquite–Talparo}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Chaguanas]] || {{flag|Chaguanas}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Tunapuna–Piarco]] || {{flag|Tunapuna–Piarco}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Mayaro–Rio Claro]] || {{flag|Mayaro–Rio Claro}}
|-
| [[Template:Country data Princes Town region]] || {{flag|Princes Town region}}
|}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>

[[Category:Country data templates of Trinidad and Tobago| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]

</noinclude>
